title: The North Wind and the Sun
synopsis: The North Wind and the Sun argue over who is stronger. A story about the quiet power of gentleness.
sentences: The North Wind and the Sun once argued about which of them was stronger.
As they argued, they saw a traveler walking along the road in a heavy coat.
They agreed that the one who could make the traveler remove his coat would be the winner.
The North Wind went first and blew with all his might.
He roared across the hills and whipped dust into the air.
But the harder he blew, the tighter the traveler wrapped his coat around himself.
At last, the North Wind gave up, tired and angry.
Then the Sun shone out warmly from behind the clouds.
The air grew soft and bright, and the traveler soon felt too warm for his coat.
He loosened it, then took it off completely.
The Sun smiled quietly while the North Wind said nothing.
Gentleness can often succeed where force fails.
